titleStmt.title: SII 28.131: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 131. (A.R. No. 286 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.

Records an order issued under the authority of Chēdiyarāyan authorising the inscription of the record of a gift of land of 3 vēli extent, which had been purchased, for food offerings and lamps to a deity in a temple in the Aḻagiya-Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ-tiruvīdi complex. As the continuation of the lines of the inscription is built in, other details about the gift have been lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī ḥ śrīmelkuttikkumel komāṟapaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekara tevarkku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu 10000 9 1000 8 100 9 10ṉāl ceytiyarāyaṉ Olai Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampala Continuation of lines 1-5 built in.
m tirukkaikoṭṭi paṇṭārattārum kaṇṭu perumpaṟṟap puliyūril Aḻakiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tiruvītiyil melaittiruvītiyil teṉ tuṇṭattu melciṟakil teṉ
muṭaiyārkku nittapaṭiyāka Amutu ceytaruḷa tillaināyakaṉ perumpaṇṭārattu viṭum celavirācakecariyāl pūrikkuttal Arici kuṟuṇikkum tirukkāka taḷḷippaṇṭārattu
paṟṟu Eṭṭukkum tiruviḷakkeṇṇaikku Eṇṇaip paṇṭārattu viṭum cilavirācakecariyāl viṭum Eṇṇai Urikkum Uṭaṟkoṭpaṭi veṇṭum nellukku tāṉam nāñcili
ṭaiyār tirunāmattāl vilaikoṇṭa prāmāṇappaṭi nilam muvelikkum Ikkoyilttānattārnattār is written as a correction. The final is written below the line.Eḻutti koṇṭaṭa is written below the line.cātaṉam tirukkaioṭṭip paṇṭāratte Oṭukkuvittuk koṇṭu Ariciyum A
kkeṇṇaiyum paṇṭāraṅkaḷ toṟum viṭavum Ippaṭikku tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum kaṭavatākap paṇṇuvate Ippaṭikku Ivai cetiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 28.131 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
